description: Evaluation rubric for Accessibility Deep Audit a11y_analyzer qualification

dimensions.name: Factual grounding
dimensions.description: Every claim must be traceable to input data. No invented audits, WCAG criteria, or page conditions.

dimensions.name: Severity accuracy
dimensions.description: Issues are correctly classified by severity based on accessibility impact.

dimensions.name: Finding clarity
dimensions.description: Findings are described in plain language suitable for a developer or content editor.

dimensions.name: WCAG mapping accuracy
dimensions.description: WCAG success criteria are correctly identified for each issue.

dimensions.name: Output-schema compliance
dimensions.description: Output is valid JSON matching the output schema.

failConditions: inventing audit IDs not present in input
